artifact: Eliminated in Q1 are the five drivers with the worst q1 times, i.e. maximum q1 values.
sql: SELECT d.driverRef FROM qualifying q JOIN drivers d ON d.driverId = q.driverId WHERE q.raceId = 20 AND q.q1 IS NOT NULL AND q.q1 <> '' ORDER BY q.q1 DESC LIMIT 5;
